overview.short: St. John's Cathedral, Nazareth is a much-loved heritage city in Tamil Nadu, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: St. John's Cathedral is the cathedral of the Thoothukudi - Nazareth Diocese of the Church of South India.

topPlaces.description: Our Lady of Assumption Church is a Roman Catholic church in Pragasapuram, India.

topPlaces.name: Nazareth, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Nazareth is a town in the Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Vellamadam
topPlaces.description: Vellamdam is a village in Thoothukudi district in Tamil Nadu. It is situated 4 kilometers away from Nazareth, 32 kilometers away from Tirunelveli and 41 kilometers away from Thoothukudi.

topPlaces.name: Pattakkarai
topPlaces.description: Pattakkarai is a small village situated near Nazareth in the Thoothukudi District of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located on the road from Nazareth, which is 4 km away, to Tiruchendur.

topPlaces.name: Thirukkolur
topPlaces.description: Thirukkolur (or Thirukalur ) is a village in Thoothukudi district in Tamil Nadu. The village is the location of the Sri Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple.

topPlaces.name: Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: Vaithamanidhi Permual Temple (also called Thirukolur) is one of the nine Nava Tirupathi, the Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu. It is located on the village of Thirukkolur which is located on Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Makara Nedunkuzhaikathar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Makara Nedunkuḻaikathar Temple is one of the Nava Tirupathi, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Thenthiruperai along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route, Tamil Nadu, India in the southern bank of Thamiraparani river. It is located 5 km from Alvar Thirunagari All these 9 temples are classified as Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered by the 12 poet saints, or Alvars.

topPlaces.name: Irattai Thiruppathy
topPlaces.description: Irattai Tirupati Temples refer to two temples of the Nava Tirupati, namely, the Devapiran temple and Aravindalochanar temple, which are dedicated to Vishnu. They are part of the nine "Divya Desams" located along the Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route in Tamil Nadu, India on the banks of Thamiraparani river.

items.note: Our Lady of Assumption Church is a Roman Catholic church in Pragasapuram, India.
Nazareth is a town in the Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Vellamdam is a village in Thoothukudi district in Tamil Nadu. It is situated 4 kilometers away from Nazareth, 32 kilometers away from Tirunelveli and 41 kilometers away from Thoothukudi.
Pattakkarai is a small village situated near Nazareth in the Thoothukudi District of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located on the road from Nazareth, which is 4 km away, to Tiruchendur.
Thirukkolur (or Thirukalur ) is a village in Thoothukudi district in Tamil Nadu. The village is the location of the Sri Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple.

Vaithamanidhi Permual Temple (also called Thirukolur) is one of the nine Nava Tirupathi, the Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu. It is located on the village of Thirukkolur which is located on Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu, India.

The Makara Nedunkuḻaikathar Temple is one of the Nava Tirupathi, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Thenthiruperai along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route, Tamil Nadu, India in the southern bank of Thamiraparani river. It is located 5 km from Alvar Thirunagari All these 9 temples are classified as Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered by the 12 poet saints, or Alvars.

Irattai Tirupati Temples refer to two temples of the Nava Tirupati, namely, the Devapiran temple and Aravindalochanar temple, which are dedicated to Vishnu. They are part of the nine "Divya Desams" located along the Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route in Tamil Nadu, India on the banks of Thamiraparani river.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. John's Cathedral, Nazareth?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. John's Cathedral, Nazareth is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. John's Cathedral, Nazareth?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (116 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (112 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. John's Cathedral, Nazareth?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. John's Cathedral, Nazareth at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. John's Cathedral, Nazareth?
faq.a: Stays in St. John's Cathedral, Nazareth start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. John's Cathedral, Nazareth?
faq.a: The top attractions are Our Lady of Assumption Church, Pragasapuram, Nazareth, Tamil Nadu, Vellamadam, Pattakkarai, Thirukkolur.
